name: DoIP_UDPSend
title: DoIP_UDPSend
syntax: long DoIP_UDPSend(dword payloadType, byte payload[], dword payloadLen);
long DoIP_UDPSend(char IPaddress[], dword payloadType, byte payload[], dword payloadLen);
description: Sends a DoIP PDU with valid layout to peer(s) as UDP frame. The configured DoIP version is used.

parameters.name: IPaddress
parameters.description: If given, do not send to the selected peer, but to this address.

parameters.name: payloadType
parameters.description: Type to send, i.e. this can be any value. [0; 0xFFFF]

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The data following the generic DoIP header.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
